description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular yellow toolbox with a hard plastic shell designed for outdoor or heavy-duty use. The box features a hinged lid that opens upwards, revealing a single large internal compartment without visible trays or dividers. Two robust black latches secure the lid at the front, and a central black handle is mounted for easy carrying. The exterior is reinforced with molded ridges for added strength and durability, and the corners are rounded for impact resistance. A rectangular brand logo label is affixed to the front of the lid, providing identification and a professional appearance. The interior appears spacious and unlined, suitable for storing a variety of tools or equipment.
description: A durable yellow hard-shell toolbox with a hinged lid, black handle, and secure latches, featuring a single large internal compartment and a visible brand logo on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed lid, two black latches, and a centered brand logo label.
description_view_1: Left side view with the lid open, revealing the depth of the main compartment and the thickness of the lid.
description_view_2: Open front view displaying the spacious, undivided interior, black handle, and both latches flipped up.
description_view_3: Right side view with the lid open, similar to the left side, showing the box's depth and construction.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed plastic handle, rectangular with rounded edges, mounted on the front for carrying; appears ergonomic with a textured grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two black plastic snap latches on the front, robust and easy to operate, no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular brand logo label is visible on the front of the lid, featuring the text 'OUTDOOR CASES' and additional smaller text.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment with no visible trays, dividers, or removable bins; the interior is open and unlined.
attribute_external_labeling: Rectangular brand logo label on the front of the lid with the text 'OUTDOOR CASES' and smaller text below.
